title: HG Tile Cleaner, Product 16, Highly Concentrated Formula for Ceramic and Natural Stone Floors, Mop or Polish for Effective Dirt Removal – 1L (184100106)
description: Product DescriptionHG tile cleaner is a freshly-scented, concentrated mopping cleaner for all types of unglazed stoneware and porcelain floor tiles. This tile polish cleaning product is very concentrated, so 1 litre is sufficient for approximately 40 washes. This mopping tile floor cleaner was developed especially for fast and frequent cleaning of unglazed ceramic tile floors, non-calciferous natural stone floors and even decorative gravel flooring. Includes: 1 x HG tile cleaner (1L bottle). How to use HG tile cleaner (Product 16, 184100106): 1. Dissolve 25ml (¼ cup) of HG tile cleaner in half a bucket (5L) of lukewarm water. 2. Clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly rinsing it in the tile cleaning solution. 3. Do not rinse or mop dry, simply leave the floor to dry on its own. For regular and absolutely streak-free cleaning of glossy tile floors, we recommend HG tile cleaner streak free (HG product 18).IngredientsLiquidBox Contains1 x 1LSee more
features: HG Tile Cleaner: This tile cleaning solution is ideal for cleaning all types of unglazed ceramic tile floors and non-calciferous natural stone floors
Designed for regular cleaning: Freshly scented cleaning solution developed for frequent cleaning of unglazed ceramic tiles, non-calciferous natural stone, and even decorative gravel flooring
Deep clean: Irregularities and small holes or pores in the floor surface can collect dirt and deposits of limescale, HG Tile Cleaner helps remove these, leaving the floor thoroughly clean and shining
Usage: One litre of HG Tile Cleaner is sufficient for approximately 40 washes
How to use: Dissolve 25ml in 5L of lukewarm water, clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly ringing in the tile cleaning solution, then leave to dry
breadCrumbs: Grocery > Home Care & Cleaning > Household Cleaners > Floor Cleaners
